auth_note: Tests requiring authentication must first call POST /auth/login to obtain an accessToken. Use Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Refresh token is in httpOnly cookie 'nexa_refresh_token'.

endpoints.description: Authenticate user with email/password, optionally with MFA token

test_cases.name: Login - happy path with valid credentials

db_verification.expected: lastLoginAt should be updated to approximately now

test_cases.name: Login - invalid email returns 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS
Login - wrong password returns 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS (same message as wrong email)
Login - missing email field returns 400 validation error
Login - missing password field returns 400 validation error
Login - invalid email format returns 400 validation error
Login - empty body returns 400 validation error
Login - inactive user returns 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS
Login - account locked after 5 failed attempts returns 423

request.note: Must be preceded by 4 failed attempts, this is the 5th. Then a 6th attempt with correct or wrong password should return 423.

test_cases.name: Login - MFA enabled user without mfaToken returns requiresMfa: true
Login - MFA enabled user with valid TOTP returns full JWT tokens

request.note: Generate valid TOTP from known mfaSecret using otpauth library

test_cases.name: Login - MFA enabled user with invalid TOTP returns 401 MFA_INVALID
Login - mfaToken with wrong format (not 6 digits) returns 400
Login - successful login resets failed attempt counter

request.note: After 3 failed attempts, a successful login should reset the counter. Then 5 more failures should be needed to lock.

endpoints.description: Refresh JWT access token using httpOnly refresh token cookie

test_cases.name: Refresh - happy path with valid refresh token cookie

db_verification.expected: revokedAt should be set (old token revoked after rotation)

test_cases.name: Refresh - old refresh token rejected after rotation (replay prevention)

request.note: Use the refresh token that was already consumed in E2-TC-015

test_cases.name: Refresh - no cookie returns 401
Refresh - invalid/random token in cookie returns 401
Refresh - expired refresh token returns 401

request.note: Requires inserting a RefreshToken record with expiresAt in the past

endpoints.description: Logout user, revoke refresh token and clear cookie

test_cases.name: Logout - happy path revokes refresh token and clears cookie
Logout - subsequent refresh attempt after logout fails

request.note: Use the same token that was revoked in E2-TC-020

test_cases.name: Logout - no cookie still returns 200 (idempotent)

endpoints.description: Generate TOTP secret and QR URI for MFA setup

test_cases.name: MFA Setup - happy path returns secret and URI

db_verification.expected: mfaSecret should be set (not null), mfaEnabled should remain false

test_cases.name: MFA Setup - no auth token returns 401
MFA Setup - already enabled returns 409 MFA_ALREADY_ENABLED

endpoints.description: Verify TOTP code and permanently enable MFA on account

test_cases.name: MFA Verify - happy path with valid TOTP enables MFA

request.note: Generate from the secret returned by /auth/mfa/setup

test_cases.name: MFA Verify - invalid TOTP returns 401 MFA_INVALID
MFA Verify - no auth token returns 401
MFA Verify - missing token field returns 400
MFA Verify - token not 6 digits returns 400
MFA Verify - no mfaSecret set returns 400 MFA_SETUP_REQUIRED
MFA Verify - rate limit after 5 failed attempts returns 423

request.note: Must be preceded by 4 failed attempts

endpoints.description: Admin resets MFA for another user (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: MFA Reset - happy path clears mfaSecret and mfaEnabled
MFA Reset - revokes all sessions for target user

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "RefreshToken" WHERE "userId" = '<target-user-id>' AND "revokedAt" IS NULL

test_cases.name: MFA Reset - self-reset returns 403 FORBIDDEN
MFA Reset - STAFF user denied (403)
MFA Reset - non-existent userId returns 404
MFA Reset - invalid userId format returns 400
MFA Reset - ADMIN cannot reset user in different company (403)

endpoints.description: Create a new user (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Create User - happy path with valid data

db_verification.query: SELECT id, email, "passwordHash", "companyId" FROM "User" WHERE email = 'newuser@nexa-test.com'
db_verification.expected: User exists, passwordHash is Argon2id hash (starts with $argon2id$), companyId matches request context

test_cases.name: Create User - creates global role in UserCompanyRole

db_verification.query: SELECT role, "companyId" FROM "UserCompanyRole" WHERE "userId" = '<created-user-id>' AND "companyId" IS NULL
db_verification.expected: One record with role=MANAGER and companyId=NULL (global role)

test_cases.name: Create User - duplicate email returns 409 DUPLICATE_EMAIL
Create User - missing required fields returns 400
Create User - password too short (<8 chars) returns 400
Create User - invalid role enum value returns 400
Create User - invalid module name returns 400
Create User - STAFF user denied (403 FORBIDDEN)
Create User - no auth token returns 401
Create User - non-SUPER_ADMIN cannot create SUPER_ADMIN user (403)

endpoints.description: Create a new company profile with default number series (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Create Company - happy path with valid data

db_verification.expected: count should be 9 (default number series generated: INVOICE, CREDIT_NOTE, SALES_ORDER, SALES_QUOTE, PURCHASE_ORDER, JOURNAL, CUSTOMER, SUPPLIER, EMPLOYEE)

test_cases.name: Create Company - grants ADMIN role to creating user
Create Company - missing name returns 400
Create Company - invalid baseCurrencyCode length returns 400
Create Company - STAFF user denied (403)

endpoints.description: Health check endpoint (public, no auth)

test_cases.name: Health - happy path returns status ok
Health - accessible without authentication

endpoints.description: List users with cursor pagination (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: List Users - happy path returns paginated list
List Users - with limit parameter
List Users - with cursor pagination (second page)

body_shape.data: array of users (different from first page)

test_cases.name: List Users - with search filter

body_shape.data: array filtered by search term in email/firstName/lastName

test_cases.name: List Users - with isActive filter
List Users - with sort and order
List Users - invalid limit (>100) returns 400
List Users - STAFF user denied (403)
List Users - no auth returns 401
List Users - scoped to company (returns only users in current company)

body_shape.data: all items have companyId matching ctx.companyId

endpoints.description: Get a single user by ID (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Get User - happy path returns user object
Get User - non-existent ID returns 404
Get User - invalid UUID format returns 400
Get User - user from different company returns 404 (company isolation)

endpoints.description: Get current company profile (VIEWER+ required)

test_cases.name: Get Company Profile - happy path returns profile
Get Company Profile - VIEWER can access (minimum role)
Get Company Profile - no auth returns 401
Get Company Profile - non-existent company returns 403 (prevents enumeration)

expected.note: Company context middleware returns 403 (not 404) to prevent enumeration

endpoints.description: Update user details (firstName, lastName) (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Update User - happy path updates firstName and lastName
Update User - partial update (only firstName)
Update User - non-existent user returns 404
Update User - user from different company returns 404 (isolation)
Update User - empty firstName returns 400

endpoints.description: Update user's global role (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Update Role - happy path updates global role

db_verification.query: SELECT role FROM "UserCompanyRole" WHERE "userId" = '<user-id>' AND "companyId" IS NULL

test_cases.name: Update Role - non-SUPER_ADMIN cannot assign SUPER_ADMIN (403)
Update Role - invalid role value returns 400
Update Role - non-existent user returns 404

endpoints.description: Update user's enabled modules (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Update Modules - happy path updates enabled modules
Update Modules - empty array (remove all modules)
Update Modules - invalid module name returns 400
Update Modules - non-existent user returns 404

endpoints.description: Update current company profile (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Update Company Profile - happy path

db_verification.query: SELECT name, phone, "updatedBy" FROM "CompanyProfile" WHERE id = '<companyId>'
db_verification.expected: name='Updated Company Name', phone='+44 20 1234 5678', updatedBy=requesting user

test_cases.name: Update Company Profile - partial update (only phone)
Update Company Profile - baseCurrencyCode not allowed in update

expected.note: baseCurrencyCode is omitted from update schema

test_cases.name: Update Company Profile - STAFF denied (403)
Update Company Profile - invalid email format returns 400
Update Company Profile - invalid website URL returns 400

endpoints.description: Switch user's active company context (VIEWER+ required)

test_cases.name: Company Switch - happy path switches to authorized company
Company Switch - unauthorized company returns 403
Company Switch - non-existent company returns 403 (not 404 to prevent enumeration)
Company Switch - invalid UUID format returns 400
Company Switch - no auth returns 401
Company Switch - inactive company returns 403

endpoints.description: Soft-delete (deactivate) a user (ADMIN+ required)

test_cases.name: Delete User - happy path deactivates user
Delete User - revokes all refresh tokens for deactivated user

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "RefreshToken" WHERE "userId" = '<user-id>' AND "revokedAt" IS NULL

test_cases.name: Delete User - self-deactivation returns 422 SELF_DEACTIVATION
Delete User - non-existent user returns 404
Delete User - STAFF denied (403)
Delete User - no auth returns 401

endpoints.description: Cross-cutting: JWT verification hook on all authenticated routes

test_cases.name: JWT Hook - expired token returns 401
JWT Hook - malformed token returns 401
JWT Hook - missing Bearer prefix returns 401

endpoints.description: Cross-cutting: Company context middleware and X-Company-ID header handling

test_cases.name: Company Context - X-Company-ID header with unauthorized company returns 403
Company Context - no X-Company-ID header defaults to user.companyId
Company Context - invalid UUID in X-Company-ID returns 400

endpoints.description: Cross-cutting: Correlation ID, error envelope, 404 handler

test_cases.name: Correlation ID - generated when not provided
Correlation ID - echoes valid incoming header
404 Handler - unknown route returns standardised error envelope

cross_cutting_concerns_tested: JWT verification hook (expired, malformed, missing Bearer)
RBAC guard (role hierarchy enforcement for VIEWER < STAFF < MANAGER < ADMIN < SUPER_ADMIN)
Company context middleware (X-Company-ID header, company isolation, default fallback)
Error handler (standardised envelope for all error types)
MFA two-step auth flow (requiresMfa challenge, TOTP verification)
risks_covered: R-003: Refresh token replay after rotation
R-007: Company context middleware missing on routes
R-010: Information leakage on failed login
